items.title: Beauty Briefing: AI-developed fragrance molecules to be put up for auction at the World Perfumery Congress
items.summary: AI-powered fragrance startup Osmo auctioning patented AI-developed fragrance molecules at the World Perfumery Congress. AI disrupting fragrance formulation.

items.title: 'TikTok is a mafia': Winning on TikTok Shop means playing the game
items.summary: TikTok Shop driving massive beauty sales via livestream and affiliate networks. Beauty brands must navigate complex creator ecosystem to succeed.

items.title: Wearables that track sun exposure are here and ready to disrupt the sun-care market
items.summary: Wearable startup The90 launched sun exposure tracking device disrupting suncare. Intersection of wearable tech and sun protection trend.

items.title: Port of LA Forecasts 7% Cargo Decline in 2027 as Trade Uncertainty Clouds Outlook
items.summary: Trade policy uncertainty and volatile global shipping conditions expected to weigh on import volumes. Cross-border sellers face logistics cost risk.

items.title: Rising fuel costs push brands to adjust shipping policies
items.summary: Brands raising free shipping thresholds, adding delivery fees to cope with rising fuel costs. Affects DTC brands and cross-border sellers.

items.title: AI forces retailers, brands to rethink their product pages
items.summary: AI is reshaping how brands design product pages for AI search discovery. Beauty brands need to optimize for AI-powered search and recommendations.

items.title: After Ulta Rollout, Unite Hair Deepens Retail Push With Sephora Debut
items.summary: Unite Hair expands from salon-only to Ulta + Sephora retail. Indie beauty brands pursuing multi-channel retail strategy in NA.

items.title: Kiuda Group Acquires CGETC To Build One-Stop Infrastructure Platform For K-Beauty
items.summary: Kiuda Group acquires CGETC to build K-beauty infrastructure platform connecting Korean brands to US market. K-beauty export ecosystem expanding.

items.title: With 400% Growth, TikTok-Favorite Mermade Hair Preps For Major U.S. Expansion
items.summary: Mermade Hair achieved 400% growth driven by TikTok virality, now expanding to major US retail. Social commerce + retail expansion model.

items.title: No Influencers, No Big Ad Spend: Anti-Wellness Brand Sleep Or Die Badass Build
items.summary: Sleep Or Die anti-wellness brand builds through word-of-mouth without influencer spend. Counter-trend to influencer-heavy beauty marketing.

items.title: Why more better-for-you brands are leading with taste over health claims
items.summary: Wellness brands shifting from health claims to experiential/taste appeal. Relevant to beauty wellness crossover products.

items.title: TikTok Shop Beauty: Livestream + Affiliate Network Dominates Social Commerce
items.summary: TikTok Shop is a dominant force in NA beauty sales. Success requires participating in creator affiliate ecosystem ("TikTok is a mafia"). Livestream commerce + affiliate networks drive massive beauty product sales. Beauty brands must invest in creator partnerships and TikTok-native content to compete. Social commerce is the defining channel for 2026 beauty launches.

items.title: Wearable Sun Exposure Trackers Launch - Tech Meets Suncare Disruption
items.summary: Startup The90 launched wearable UV exposure tracking device disrupting suncare market in NA. Tech-beauty crossover trend: UV wearables prompt real-time SPF application. Opportunity for sunscreen brands to partner or align with tech wellness devices. Suncare category increasingly tech-driven with personalization.

items.title: K-Beauty US Distribution Infrastructure Matures: Kiuda/CGETC Acquisition
items.summary: Kiuda Group acquires CGETC to build one-stop K-beauty infrastructure: warehousing, fulfillment, customs/freight for Korean brands entering US. This signals K-beauty export ecosystem is maturing and lowering entry barriers. Korean skincare brands (like medicube, BIODANCE) now have better US logistics support. K-beauty products dominate Amazon bestsellers.

items.title: Mermade Hair: TikTok Viral + US Retail Expansion Blueprint for Hair Tools
items.summary: Australian haircare/styling tool brand Mermade Hair achieved 400% growth driven by TikTok viral content (Toure Capital backing). Now pursuing major US retail expansion. Model: TikTok viral discovery -> DTC -> major retail distribution. Hair styling tools category hot on TikTok Shop NA.
